scripts.dev: concurrently -n site,api,dash,dash-api,gw -c blue,green,magenta,yellow,cyan "npm run dev -w @pms/frontend" "npm run dev -w @pms/backend" "npm run dev -w @pms/dashboard-frontend" "npm run dev -w @pms/dashboard-backend" "node scripts/dev-gateway.mjs"
scripts.dev:dashboard: concurrently -n dash,dash-api -c magenta,yellow "npm run dev -w @pms/dashboard-frontend" "npm run dev -w @pms/dashboard-backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @pms/frontend && npm run build -w @pms/backend && npm run build -w @pms/dashboard-frontend && npm run build -w @pms/dashboard-backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @pms/frontend && npm run lint -w @pms/backend && npm run lint -w @pms/dashboard-frontend && npm run lint -w @pms/dashboard-backend
